metadata.description: Xenomoon Forge — per-domain agents, skills, tools and hooks for AI-assisted development. One plugin per domain; doctor prints which to install.

plugins.name: xenomoon-webapp
plugins.description: Web app domain package (empty POC) for React + Node.js — capabilities are learned per project, none ship pre-baked.

plugins.name: xenomoon-app
plugins.description: App domain package (empty POC) — capabilities are learned per project, none ship pre-baked.
